offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts and over-ordering. We provide an inventory management system instead of manual inventory tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts and over-ordering
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Indie Hackers posts on inventory management challenges
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Community forums discussing inventory management tools
try_it: Let users try real-time tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video of manual tracking process
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
